Correction to: Retrospective Comparison of Short and Mid Term Performance of 200 µm Polyethylene Glycol Microspheres vs Ethiodized Oil Emulsion for Genicular Artery Embolization in Symptomatic Knee Osteoarthritis.
Comparative Analysis of the LOBO Device and Coils for Proximal Splenic Artery Embolization: A Multi-Institutional Retrospective Study.
abstract: PURPOSE: To evaluate the technical and clinical efficacy of the low-profile braided occluder (LOBO) device for proximal splenic artery embolization (SAE) and compare its performance with conventional coil embolization. MATERIALS AND METHODS: This retrospective multi-institutional study included 44 consecutive patients who underwent proximal SAE between June 2023 and October 2025. Demographic data, etiology, embolic device type, fluoroscopy time, radiation dose, and outcomes were recorded. Technical success was defined as complete angiographic occlusion using the index device. Clinical success was defined as the absence of rebleeding or reintervention within 30 days. RESULTS: Of the 44 patients (mean age, 43.2 years; 39% females), 22 were treated using the LOBO device and 22 with coils. Trauma was the most common etiology (n = 37, 84.1%). There were no clinical or demographic characteristic differences between the LOBO and coil groups. Proximal SAE was achieved with a single LOBO device in all patients. The mean number of coils used was 4.6 per case (median 3.5), p < 0.001. Median fluoroscopy time was significantly reduced with LOBO compared with coils (11.65 vs 18.9 min; p = 0.01). Radiation dose was significantly lower as well in the LOBO group compared with the coil group (128.4 vs 198.5 mGy; p = 0.04). Clinical success was not significantly different between the groups, with the LOBO group achieving 100% and the coil group 90.9% (p > 0.05). Splenic infarction was significantly higher with coils than with LOBO (33.3% vs 22.7%; p = 0.046). No major adverse events occurred, and minor events were self-limited. One death in each group was attributable to polytrauma and unrelated to the procedure. CONCLUSION: The LOBO device provides safe, effective proximal SAE with significantly reduced fluoroscopy time and radiation dose compared with coils. Larger prospective studies are warranted. LEVEL OF EVIDENCE: Level 4, study (retrospective, standard quality).

summary.title_ko: LOBO 기기와 코일(Coils)을 이용한 비장동맥화학색전술(Splenic Artery Embolization, SAE)의 비교 분석: 다기관 후향적 연구
summary.one_line: 본 연구는 LOBO 기기가 코일에 비해 비장동맥화학색전술(SAE) 시 더 짧은 조영술 시간과 낮은 방사선 노출량을 제공하며, 임상적 성공률은 유사함을 보여줍니다.
summary.subjects: 총 44명 (평균 연령 43.2세, 여성 39%)
summary.intervention: LOBO 기기(22명) vs 코일(Coils, 22명)을 이용한 비장동맥화학색전술(SAE)
summary.results: LOBO 기기군은 코일군에 비해 조영술 시간 중앙값(Median Fluoroscopy Time)이 유의하게 짧았으며 (11.65분 vs 18.9분, p = 0.01), 방사선량(Radiation Dose) 또한 유의하게 낮았습니다 (128.4 mGy vs 198.5 mGy, p = 0.04). 기술적 성공률은 LOBO 기기군에서 100%, 코일군에서 90.9%였으며 (p > 0.05), 임상적 성공률은 두 군 간에 유의미한 차이가 없었습니다. 코일군에서 비장 괴사(Splenic Infarction) 발생률이 LOBO 기기군보다 유의하게 높았습니다 (33.3% vs 22.7%, p = 0.046).  LOBO 기기군에서 코일군보다 평균 4.6개(중앙값 3.5개)의 코일이 사용되었습니다 (p < 0.001).
summary.implication: LOBO 기기는 비장동맥화학색전술(SAE) 시 안전하고 효과적인 방법이며, 코일에 비해 조영술 시간과 방사선 노출량을 줄일 수 있습니다. 향후 더 큰 규모의 전향적 연구가 필요합니다.

title: Excimer Laser Recanalization of a Chronically Occluded Iliofemoral Vessel with Cone-Beam CT Guidance.

Commentary on "Efficacy of Transarterial Radioembolization and Transarterial Chemoembolization as Downstaging or Bridging Strategies for Hepatocellular Carcinoma Before Liver Transplantation: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis" Xie M. and Zhen Y. CVIR 2025.
Correction to: CIRSE Standards of Practice on Peri-operative Anticoagulation Management During Interventional Radiology Procedures.
Baseline Portal Vein Thrombosis does not Worsen Long-Term Outcomes After Technically Successful TIPS in Cirrhotic Variceal Bleeding: A Single-Center Retrospective Cohort Study.
abstract: PURPOSE: To investigate whether the presence of baseline portal vein thrombosis (PVT) and its anatomical subtypes influence long-term outcomes in cirrhotic patients with esophagogastric variceal bleeding (EGVB) undergoing technically successful transjugular intrahepatic portosystemic shunt (TIPS). MATERIALS AND METHODS: This retrospective cohort study included 140 cirrhotic EGVB patients who underwent successful TIPS between 2017 and 2024. Patients were stratified into groups with (n = 52) and without baseline PVT (n = 88) based on cross-sectional imaging. PVT was subclassified into simple (main trunk only) and mixed (extending to branches/mesenteric veins) types. The primary composite endpoint included all-cause mortality, variceal rebleeding, or shunt dysfunction. Kaplan-Meier analysis and multivariable Cox regression were performed. RESULTS: Median follow-up was 1286 days. Composite endpoint events occurred in 59 patients (42.1%), with no significant difference between patients with and without PVT (40.4% vs. 43.2%, P = 0.742). Cumulative event-free survival was comparable (log-rank P = 0.650). Within the PVT cohort, no difference was observed between simple and mixed subtypes (HR = 0.80, P = 0.736). Multivariable analysis confirmed that baseline PVT was not an independent predictor of adverse outcomes (HR = 0.92, P = 0.799). However, higher baseline portal pressure gradient (PPG) (HR = 1.09 per mmHg, P = 0.002) and prior history of overt hepatic encephalopathy (OHE) (HR = 3.33, P = 0.040) were identified as independent predictors. CONCLUSIONS: Baseline PVT, regardless of morphological subtype, does not appear to adversely affect long-term outcomes in the specific cohort of patients in whom TIPS is technically feasible and successful. Higher baseline PPG and history of OHE are primary determinants of long-term prognosis.

summary.title_ko: 간문맥 혈전증(Portal Vein Thrombosis) 유무는 기술적으로 성공적인 TIPS 시술 후 장기적인 예후에 영향을 미치지 않는다: 단일 기관 후향적 코호트 연구
summary.one_line: 간문맥 혈전증(PVT)이 있는 환자에서도 기술적으로 성공적인 TIPS 시술 후 장기적인 예후는 PVT가 없는 환자와 유사하다.
summary.subjects: 간경변성 식도정맥 출혈(EGVB) 환자 140명 (간문맥 혈전증(PVT)군: 52명, 비간문맥 혈전증군: 88명)
summary.intervention: 경정맥경 통해 간내 문-체계 우회술(transjugular intrahepatic portosystemic shunt, TIPS)
summary.results: 중앙 추적 관찰 기간은 1286일이었으며, 전체 환자군에서 복합 사건 발생률은 42.1%였다. 간문맥 혈전증(PVT)군과 비간문맥 혈전증군 간의 복합 사건 발생률 차이는 유의하지 않았음 (40.4% vs. 43.2%, P = 0.742). 무사건 생존율(event-free survival) 또한 유사했으며 (log-rank P = 0.650). 간문맥 혈전증(PVT)군 내에서 단순형(main trunk only)과 혼합형(extending to branches/mesenteric veins) 간에도 유의미한 차이는 없었음 (HR = 0.80, P = 0.736). 다변량 Cox 회귀 분석 결과, 간문맥 혈전증(PVT)은 불리한 예후의 독립적인 예측 인자가 아니었음 (HR = 0.92, P = 0.799). 반면, 기저 portal pressure gradient (PPG)가 높을수록 (HR = 1.09 per mmHg, P = 0.002) 및 과거 overt hepatic encephalopathy (OHE) 병력이 있는 경우 (HR = 3.33, P = 0.040) 장기적인 예후를 불리하게 예측하는 독립적인 요인으로 확인되었다.
summary.implication: 기술적으로 성공적인 TIPS 시술이 가능한 간경변성 식도정맥 출혈 환자에서 간문맥 혈전증(PVT)의 유무는 장기적인 예후에 큰 영향을 미치지 않으며, portal pressure gradient (PPG) 및 overt hepatic encephalopathy (OHE) 병력이 예후를 결정하는 주요 요인이다.

title: Clinical, Laboratory, and Imaging Characteristics of Spontaneous Soft-Tissue Hematomas in Anticoagulated Patients: Arterial Embolization Versus Conservative Treatment.
abstract: PURPOSE: To compare outcomes (clinical, laboratory and imaging features) and identify predictive factors for arterial embolization versus conservative treatment in the management of anticoagulated patients with spontaneous abdominal or pelvic hematomas. MATERIAL AND METHODS: This retrospective single-center study analyzed 219 patients under anticoagulation therapy with spontaneous soft-tissue hematoma, between 2015 and 2020. Sixty two patients (28%) were treated with transcatheter arterial embolization (TAE) after multidisciplinary team discussion. Demographics, clinical, laboratory data, computed tomography (CT) findings, and treatment details were compared. Clinical success was defined as cessation of bleeding, hemodynamic stabilization, and hemoglobin level stabilization. Prognostic factors for 30-day mortality were assessed using univariate and multivariate Cox analyses. RESULTS: Patients referred for embolization presented more frequently with hemodynamic instability (41.7% vs. 10.2%, p < 0.001), larger hematomas (1024 cm3 vs. 488 cm3, p < 0.001), and more frequent contrast extravasation in the arterial phase (85.4% vs. 51.0%, p < 0.001) and fascial rupture (45.2% vs. 12.7%, p < 0.001) on CT. Conservative management was more common in patients with anticoagulant overdose (51.1% vs. 25.5%, p = 0.002), especially vitamin K antagonists (50.4% vs. 33.0%, p = 0.024). Technical success of TAE was 93.5%, and primary clinical success was 75%. The 30-day all-cause mortality rate following embolization was 22.6%. Univariate analysis identified impaired renal function (p < 0.001), large hematoma volume (p = 0.038), and fascial rupture (p = 0.037) as predictors of mortality. No independent variable remained significant in multivariate analysis. CONCLUSION: TAE is an effective treatment option in selected patients with severe anticoagulant-related muscle hematomas, particularly in cases of hemodynamic instability or CT evidence of active bleeding and fascial rupture.

summary.title_ko: 항응고제 복용 환자의 자연 발생 연조직 혈종: 동맥 색전술 대 보존적 치료 결과 비교 및 예측 인자 분석
summary.one_line: 항응고제 복용 환자의 자연 발생 연조직 혈종에서 동맥 색전술(TAE)은 심각한 출혈 징후가 있는 환자에게 효과적인 치료 옵션이며, 보존적 치료는 항응고제 과용량 환자에게 더 적합할 수 있다.
summary.subjects: 2015년~2020년 사이 항응고제 치료 중인 자연 발생 연조직 혈종 환자 219명
summary.intervention: 동맥 색전술(Transcatheter Arterial Embolization, TAE) (62명, 28%) 대 보존적 치료
summary.results: TAE를 받은 환자는 보존적 치료 환자보다 출혈로 인한 혈역학적 불안정(41.7% vs. 10.2%, p < 0.001), 혈종 크기(1024 cm3 vs. 488 cm3, p < 0.001), 조영 증강(contrast extravasation) (85.4% vs. 51.0%, p < 0.001), 그리고 근막 파열(fascial rupture) (45.2% vs. 12.7%, p < 0.001)이 더 흔하게 나타났다. TAE의 기술적 성공률은 93.5%, 임상적 1차 성공률은 75%였다. 30일 사망률은 TAE군에서 22.6%였다. 30일 사망률의 예후 인자로 신장 기능 저하(p < 0.001), 큰 혈종 크기(p = 0.038), 근막 파열(p = 0.037)이 유의미했지만, 다변량 분석에서는 독립적인 변수는 없었다.
summary.implication: 심각한 항응고제 관련 근육 혈종 환자, 특히 혈역학적 불안정 또는 CT에서 활성 출혈 및 근막 파열이 관찰되는 경우 동맥 색전술(TAE)은 효과적인 치료 옵션이다. 항응고제 과용량, 특히 비타민 K 길항제(vitamin K antagonists)를 복용하는 환자에게는 보존적 치료가 더 적합할 수 있다.

title: Sequential Arterioureteral and Arterioenteric Fistulas Arising from an Infected Iliac Artery Pseudoaneurysm after Pelvic Radiotherapy.
Improving Periprocedural Anticoagulation Management with Retrieval-Augmented Language Models.
CT-Guided Transmandibular Cryoablation as Salvage Therapy for Recurrent Mandibular Osteoid Osteoma.
An Aberrant Anastomosis Between the Coeliac Trunk and Inferior Mesenteric Artery Resulting in a Technically Challenging Embolisation.
Directional Atherectomy Versus Plain Old Balloon Angioplasty for Vessel Preparation Before Drug-Coated Balloon Treatment in Moderate-to-Severe Calcified Lesions.
abstract: PURPOSE: This study aimed to compare directional atherectomy (DA) and plain old balloon angioplasty (POBA) for vessel preparation before drug-coated balloon (DCB) therapy in moderately to severely calcified peripheral artery disease. MATERIALS AND METHODS: This study is a sub-analysis of the Evolusion study. Inverse probability weighting was applied to balance the two groups. The primary endpoints were freedom from major adverse events (f-MAE), freedom from all-cause mortality (f-ACM), and major adverse limb events (MALE). Secondary endpoints included Rutherford classification improvement rate, bailout stent implantation rate, and bailout stent length. RESULTS: A total of 337 patients were included (254 in POBA group, 83 in DA group). POBA had higher bailout stent implantation rate (28.7% vs 16.9%, p = 0.004) and longer mean stent length (159.0 ± 78.8 mm vs 119.3 ± 58.9 mm, p < 0.001); DA enabled larger-diameter DCBs (5.11 ± 0.69 mm vs 4.73 ± 0.62 mm, p < 0.01). Over 24 months, POBA had 43 deaths (41.9% cardiovascular) and 15 post-procedural reinterventions; DA had 4 deaths and 5 reinterventions. POBA also showed lower f-MAE (78.4% vs 85.4%, p = 0.027) and f-ACM (83.2% vs 92.7%, p = 0.0035), plus higher cumulative MALE (8.5% vs 4.8%, p = 0.006). DA had greater Rutherford category improvement, reaching 89.1% vs 71.3% at 24 months. CONCLUSION: In patients with calcified lesions, DA-based vessel preparation before DCB therapy was associated with superior clinical outcomes, including higher f-MAE and f-ACM, lower MALE rates, reduced bailout stenting, shorter stent length, and greater improvement in Rutherford category, compared with POBA.

summary.title_ko: 중등도~심한 석회화 병변에서 약물코팅풍선 치료 전 혈관 전처리: 방향성 풍선절제술(Directional Atherectomy) vs. 일반 풍선확장술(Plain Old Balloon Angioplasty)
summary.one_line: 중등도~심한 석회화 병변 환자에서 약물코팅풍선 치료 전 혈관 전처리 시 방향성 풍선절제술이 일반 풍선확장술보다 우수한 임상 결과를 보였다.
summary.subjects: 총 337명 (POBA군 254명, DA군 83명)
summary.intervention: 방향성 풍선절제술(DA) vs. 일반 풍선확장술(POBA) (약물코팅풍선(DCB) 치료 전 혈관 전처리)
summary.results: POBA군은 DA군에 비해 구조적 합병증 발생률(f-MAE) 78.4% vs 85.4% (p=0.027), 전사망률(f-ACM) 83.2% vs 92.7% (p=0.0035), 주요사지합병증(MALE) 발생률 8.5% vs 4.8% (p=0.006)이 높았으며, 구조적 합병증 회피를 위한 스텐트 삽입률 28.7% vs 16.9% (p=0.004), 스텐트 평균 길이 159.0±78.8 mm vs 119.3±58.9 mm (p<0.001)이 길었다. DA군은 더 큰 직경의 DCB (5.11±0.69 mm vs 4.73±0.62 mm, p<0.01) 사용이 가능했으며, 24개월 시점에서 랭퍼드(Rutherford) 분류 개선율이 89.1% vs 71.3%로 더 높았다.
summary.implication: 석회화 병변 환자에서 약물코팅풍선 치료 전 방향성 풍선절제술을 사용하면 구조적 합병증 발생률 감소, 전사망률 감소, 주요사지합병증 감소, 스텐트 삽입 감소, 스텐트 길이 감소, 랭퍼드 분류 개선 등의 긍정적인 임상 결과를 기대할 수 있다.

Trans-radial and "Snuffbox" Access Versus Trans-femoral Access in Emergency Embolization: A Retrospective Comparative Analysis of 421 Procedures.
abstract: PURPOSE: Trans-radial access (TRA) offers advantages in elective settings, but its safety and feasibility in emergencies remain understudied. This study compares TRA and trans-femoral access (TFA) in emergency embolizations at a Level 1 trauma center. MATERIALS AND METHODS: Ethical approval was obtained for this retrospective analysis. A total of 421 emergency embolizations performed on 389 patients were included. TRA (n = 95, including 44 distal radial) and TFA (n = 326) were compared for technical success rate, procedural success rate, and access-site complications. Multivariate analysis was used to identify independent predictors of complications. RESULTS: TRA patients were younger (median 58 vs. 66 years; p = 0.044) with less hypertension (33.7% vs. 46.6%; p = 0.025). Technical success rate was 99.0% for TRA and 99.7% for TFA (p = 1.000). Procedural success was 100% for TRA and 99.7% for TFA (p = 1.000). Overall complications occurred in 5.5% (3.2% TRA vs. 6.1% TFA; p = 0.234), most were minor bleeding-related complications (2.1% TRA vs. 5.2% TFA; p = 0.164). Major complications (1.0% total) included pseudoaneurysm formation (n = 3; 1 in TRA, 2 in TFA) and retroperitoneal hemorrhage (n = 1 in TFA), with no group differences (p = 0.908). Adjusting for age, hypertension, diabetes mellitus, antithrombotic use and sheath size, multivariate analysis found that access site (TRA vs. TFA) was not found to be an independent predictor of all complications (OR 0.524; 95% CI: 0.147 - 1.859; p = 0.317). CONCLUSION: TRA, including distal radial "snuffbox" access, is a safe alternative to TFA for emergency embolization, demonstrating high technical and procedural success rates. LEVEL OF EVIDENCE: Level 4, Cohort study.

summary.title_ko: 응급 혈관 색전술에서 요골 접근법(Trans-radial) 대 대동맥 접근법(Trans-femoral) 비교: 후향적 분석
summary.one_line: 응급 상황에서 요골 접근법은 대동맥 접근법과 유사한 높은 성공률과 안전성을 보이며, 접근 부위 자체가 합병증 발생의 독립적인 예측 인자가 아니다.
summary.subjects: 총 389명의 환자에서 421건의 응급 혈관 색전술 (N=421)
summary.intervention: 요골 접근법(Trans-radial, TRA, n=95, 이 중 44명은 원위 요골 'snuffbox' 접근법) 대 대동맥 접근법(Trans-femoral, TFA, n=326)
summary.results: TRA 그룹은 TFA 그룹보다 나이가 더 젊고(중앙값 58세 vs. 66세, p=0.044) 고혈압 유병률이 낮았다(33.7% vs. 46.6%, p=0.025). 기술적 성공률은 TRA에서 99.0%, TFA에서 99.7%였으며(p=1.000), 절차적 성공률은 TRA에서 100%, TFA에서 99.7%였다(p=1.000). 전체 합병증 발생률은 TRA에서 5.5%, TFA에서 6.1%였으며(p=0.234), 대부분 경미한 출혈 관련 합병증이었다(TRA 2.1% vs. TFA 5.2%, p=0.164). 주요 합병증(총 1.0%)으로는 가성 동맥류(pseudoaneurysm) 형성(TRA 1건, TFA 2건)과 후복막 출혈(retroperitoneal hemorrhage)(TFA 1건)이 있었으며, 그룹 간 차이가 없었다(p=0.908). 다변량 분석 결과, 나이, 고혈압, 당뇨병, 항혈전제 사용, 카테터 사이즈를 보정한 후에도 접근 부위(TRA vs. TFA)가 전체 합병증 발생의 독립적인 예측 인자가 아니었다 (OR 0.524; 95% CI: 0.147 - 1.859; p=0.317).
summary.implication: 응급 혈관 색전술에서 요골 접근법은 대동맥 접근법의 안전하고 효과적인 대안이 될 수 있으며, 특히 원위 요골 'snuffbox' 접근법도 고려할 수 있다.
